title: Lucid Gravity Stop Sale Traps 2,400 Vehicles, Fueling 110% Gross Margin Collapse
text: Lucid Group's first-quarter 2026 results revealed significant operational challenges due to production disruptions. The company has produced roughly 3,200 more vehicles than it has sold since 2024, with approximately 2,400 vehicles trapped due to February's stop sale on the Lucid Gravity SUV. A supplier quality issue with second-row seats caused a 29-day stop sale on the Gravity SUV, which disrupted deliveries during a critical growth period. The stop sale incident led to a 110% gross margin collapse, with gross margin falling to -110.4% in Q1 2026 from -80.7% in the prior quarter. The inventory accumulation reflects the company's struggle to manage production while quality issues emerged during the new Gravity launch phase.
